caption: A woman wearing a dark top and a white face mask stands beside a patient lying in a hospital bed. The patient, a woman with red hair, is covered by a patterned blanket. The clinical setting includes medical equipment mounted on the wall and an IV pole. Overlaid on the scene are pink graphics and white text. The first frame shows the text "Day 2" and "Sim Week". In subsequent frames, the image transitions to a black screen, but the graphics and text remain, with the text updating to "Day 3" and "Sim Week". These elements persist through the final frames, though the visual scene of the hospital room is no longer visible.
